description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Weekly Tests that runs on a workflow dispatch. The workflow has multiple jobs: build-gem5, testlib-very-long-tests, gpu-tests, dramsys-tests, and weekly-tests. The build-gem5 job builds gem5 on a self-hosted Linux runner and uploads the artifact. The testlib-very-long-tests job runs very-long tests on multiple test types in parallel. The gpu-tests and dramsys-tests jobs run GPU and DRAMSys tests respectively. The weekly-tests job indicates whether the weekly tests have passed or not.
